title: Oracle Axing Huge Number of Jobs as AI Crisis Intensifies

title: Meta Faces Lawsuit over AI Smart Glasses Sending Sensitive Videos to Contractors in Kenya
description: Mark Zuckerberg's Meta is facing a lawsuit after reports emerged that contract workers in Kenya reviewed sensitive footage from customers' AI smart glasses, including images of nudity, drug deals, and intimate activities.The post Meta Faces Lawsuit over AI Smart Glasses Sending Sensitive Videos to Contractors in Kenya appeared first on Breitbart.

title: AI Won’t Kill Venture Capital — But It Will Gut the Middle
description: AI tools are automating deal sourcing and startup evaluation across venture capital. But the technology threatens mid-tier firms far more than elite ones, pointing toward industry consolidation rather than extinction. The relationship-driven core of top-tier VC remains beyond AI's current reach.
